remoteAutomation.title: Remote Automation Debug
remoteAutomation.description: Fixed flow: open page, run web-provided JavaScript, capture a screenshot, and return the result.

form.title: Execution Parameters
form.codePlaceholder: Enter the JavaScript code to execute
form.codeHint: The code runs in the main world of the target page. Write the function body directly, for example: `return document.title`
form.screenshotHint: Capture the current page before closing the window

validation.urlRequired: Please enter the target page URL
validation.codeRequired: Please enter the JavaScript code to execute

result.title: Execution Results
result.pluginUnsupported: The plugin is not installed or the current plugin version does not support the remoteAutomationRun method

proxyRequest.title: Plugin Proxy Request Debug
proxyRequest.description: Send any URL through the browser extension background, then return the raw response body, status, and headers to the website.

form.title: Request Parameters
form.headersHint: Enter a JSON object. Header values will be converted to strings before sending.
form.bodyHint: Valid JSON will be parsed as JSON. Invalid JSON will be sent as a raw string.
form.methodHint: The plugin will send this request as {{method}}.
form.credentialsHint: The extension sends requests with browser cookies included when the target site allows them.
form.bodyIgnoredHint: GET mode does not send a request body. Switch to POST if you need to send body content.

validation.headersInvalid: Headers must be a valid JSON object

result.title: Request Results
result.pluginUnsupported: The plugin is not installed or the current plugin version does not support the proxyRequest method

wxSphPublish.title: WeChat Channels Publish Debug
wxSphPublish.description: Use the browser extension to publish a video through WeChat Channels web requests and debug login state, video/cover upload, scheduling, location, activity, link, and original parameters.

permission.title: Permission Check
permission.denied: Plugin permissions are not fully granted

login.title: WeChat Channels Login
login.empty: Log in to channels.weixin.qq.com first, then read the login state.

form.title: Publish Parameters
form.workTitlePlaceholder: Optional, used as extra description text
form.topicsPlaceholder: Separate by comma or newline, e.g. food, coffee

location.title: Location
location.hint: Search and select a location through the WeChat Channels location API. The selected location will be submitted with the post.
location.poiIdPlaceholder: For example, uid returned by helper_search_location

validation.videoMetadataRequired: Video metadata is not ready. Please select the video again.

result.title: Publish Result
result.pluginMissing: The plugin is not installed or AIToEarnPlugin is not injected

search.minKeyword: Enter at least 2 characters to search
search.pluginUnsupported: The current plugin version does not support WeChat Channels search. Please update the plugin first.

activity.title: Activity
activity.hint: Search and select a WeChat Channels activity. It will be sent as the event parameter when publishing.

extLink.title: Link
extLink.hint: Optional. Submitted as the WeChat Channels extended reading link.

original.title: Declare Original
original.hint: When checked, the publish request marks the post as original.
